# SLO ( Single Logout ) - 4 Days 
 - Individual SP logout mechanism - 1
 - IDP Logout - 1
 ( SAML Logut, Accesstoken and Refresh token blacklist) - 1
 - Check Session table, logut table and validate - 1 days

 # IDP seed, with default values ( rsa keys pair) and other necessary values  (MYK-2598) - 2 Days

 # Implement PROTO Auto generated Import - 2.5 Days
  - VLE-Account - 1 Day
  - IDP  - 4 hrs
  - Super ADMIN - 4 hrs
  - MYkademy-API - 4 hrs

 # Single Sign On (SSO) - 5 Days
  - Make Understand the flow of SSO - 1 Day 
  - Product Switch Auto login - SAML to Token - 1 Days
  - Implement MyKademy SAML To token  - 1 Days
  - Implement MyKademy To VLE admin - 1 Days
  - Implement VLE admin to MyKademy - 1 Days

  # Session Management - 3 Days
  -  When User login in new device, track the device info ( IP, Browser, OS, Device Type) SAML + TOKEN - 1 Days ( Frontend 4hrs + Backend 4hrs)
  -  User session LIST - 1 Days ( Frontend 4hrs + Backend 4hrs)
  -  Admin Logout users form selective devices  ( Token and SAML)- 1 Days Token ( Frontend 4hrs + Backend 4hrs) 
  
# User Registration 5 Days
 - User register in IDP and Sync on SP ( MyKademy ) - 1 Days ( Frontend 4hrs + Backend 4hrs)
 - While user regiter email send to user for verification - 1 Days ( Frontend 4hrs + Backend 4hrs)
 - Password setup with validation - 4 hrs 
 - Forget Password - Send link to user email for reset password - 1 Days ( Frontend 4hrs + Backend 4hrs) 
 - User Profile Page - 4 hours ( Frontend 2hrs + Backend 2hrs)
 - User Profile Edit (Including Password Change) - 1 day ( Frontend 4hrs + Backend 4hrs)

 # Security 
 - OTP login 
 - Encryption / Decription
 - 2fa 
 - Data Masking - sensitive data
